channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Bright and dark optical chirp waves for Kundu–Eckhaus equation using Lie group analysis
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0154

item.title: Numerical solutions and conservation laws for nonlinear evolution equations
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0148

item.title: On the structural, electronic, and thermoelectric properties of EuMg2X2 (X = P, As, Sb, Bi) zintl phase; A first principles investigations
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0057

item.title: Implications of incorporating CrFeNiTiZn high-entropy alloy on the tribomechanical and microstructure morphology behaviour of A356 composites processed by friction stir processing
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0131

item.title: Improving the functionality of biosensors through the use of periodic and quasi-periodic one-dimensional phononic crystals
item.description: Article by Hasan B. Albargi, Ahmed G. Sayed, Ali Hajjiah, Abdulkarem H. M. Almawgani, Haifa A. Alqhtani, May Bin-Jumah, Mostafa R. Abukhadra, Mohammed Jalalah, Hussein A. Elsayed, Ahmed Mehaney DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0146
